---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for FileManagerDaz
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the workflow you want to improve.

**Example scenario:**
> "When I download large bundles with multiple nested archives, I want to..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Value / Impact

How would this feature benefit you and other users?

- [ ] Saves time
- [ ] Reduces errors
- [ ] Improves organization
- [ ] Other: ___

## Implementation Ideas (Optional)

If you have technical suggestions for how this could be implemented, share them here.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Related Issues

Link any related issues here:
- #issue_number
